# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a simple GitHub Actions workflow for our application CI. On every push, install dependencies, run unit tests, build the application, and deploy to our staging environment. Focus on speed - we want fast feedback for developers. We'll add security scanning later.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Application CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
      - 'feature/**'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  install-and-test:
    name: Install, Test & Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15

    permissions:
      contents: read
      checks: write

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts
        env:
          NODE_ENV: development

      - name: Run post-install scripts explicitly
        run: npm rebuild

      - name: Lint
        run: npm run lint --if-present

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm test -- --ci --coverage --reporters=default
        env:
          CI: true

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Upload build artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output-${{ github.sha }}
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 3
          if-no-files-found: error

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    needs: install-and-test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'

    permissions:
      contents: read
      deployments: write

    environment:
      name: staging
      url: ${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}

    concurrency:
      group: staging-deploy
      cancel-in-progress: false

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Download build artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output-${{ github.sha }}
          path: dist/

      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          if [ ! -d "dist" ] || [ -z "$(ls -A dist)" ]; then
            echo "::error::Build artifact is empty or missing"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Artifact contents:"
          find dist -type f | head -50
          echo "Total files: $(find dist -type f | wc -l)"

      - name: Configure deployment credentials
        run: |
          # Use OIDC or environment secrets - never inline credentials
          echo "Configuring deployment target from environment secrets..."
          if [ -z "$DEPLOY_TARGET" ]; then
            echo "::error::DEPLOY_TARGET secret is not configured for the staging environment"
            exit 1
          fi
        env:
          DEPLOY_TARGET: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TARGET }}

      - name: Deploy to staging
        run: |
          echo "Deploying commit ${{ github.sha }} to staging..."
          # Replace with your actual deployment command, e.g.:
          # npx serverless deploy --stage staging
          # aws s3 sync dist/ s3://${DEPLOY_BUCKET}/ --delete
          # kubectl apply -f k8s/staging/
          echo "Deployment command goes here"
          echo "Deploy target: configured via environment secret"
        env:
          DEPLOY_TARGET: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TARGET }}
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}

      - name: Verify deployment health
        run: |
          echo "Running post-deployment health check..."
          STAGING_URL="${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}"
          if [ -n "$STAGING_URL" ]; then
            for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do
              HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 10 "${STAGING_URL}/health" || echo "000")
              if [ "$HTTP_STATUS" = "200" ]; then
                echo "Health check passed (attempt $i)"
                exit 0
              fi
              echo "Health check attempt $i returned $HTTP_STATUS, retrying in 10s..."
              sleep 10
            done
            echo "::error::Health check failed after 5 attempts"
            exit 1
          else
            echo "::warning::STAGING_URL not configured, skipping health check"
          fi

      - name: Post deployment summary
        run: |
          echo "## Staging Deployment Summary" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **Commit:** \`${{ github.sha }}\`" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **Branch:** \`${{ github.ref_name }}\`" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **Actor:** \`${{ github.actor }}\`" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **Environment:** staging" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **URL:** ${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
